policy: Preserve every folded stub's intent, technical scope, acceptance criteria, risks, and out-of-scope boundaries. If a later MT changes this set, update this file, packet.json bundled_stub_summary, taskboard state, and traceability notes together.

folded_complete.preserved_intent: Governed multi-model execution with DOCS_ONLY vs AI_ENABLED, strict file-scope locks across concurrent WPs/MTs, compact lifecycle telemetry, HSK_STATUS, CX-MM codes, and Flight Recorder correlation.
preserved_technical_scope: Coordinator/runtime enforcement of RuntimeMode and ExecutionMode.
min_ready_models=1 readiness gate in AI_ENABLED.
INV-MM-003 strict non-overlap lock enforcement and CX-MM-002 conflict surface.
HSK_STATUS on every phase/state change, adjacent to gate output.
RoleExecutionIdentity fields for role/model/backend/parameter_class/session/wp/mt correlation.
Work Profile routing hooks and performance telemetry snapshot.
MailboxKind COLLAB remains non-authoritative.
preserved_acceptance: Overlapping lock sets block deterministically with code=CX-MM-002 and explicit conflicting paths.
DOCS_ONLY disables model-backed actions with explicit failstate/softblock codes.
RoleExecutionIdentity fields are present in outputs/telemetry for audit and debugging.
preserved_non_goals: No GPU sharding or intra-model distributed inference.
No Phase 2+ ACE-RAG retrieval caching/ContextPack expansion.
No UI polish beyond required surfaces for model readiness, lock state, lifecycle, and diagnostics.

folded_complete.preserved_intent: Provider abstractions must support orchestration-ready streaming, tool calling, structured outputs, multi-turn sessions, and adapter hardening for provider quirks.
preserved_technical_scope: ProviderCapabilities flags for streaming, tool_calling, structured_output, multi_turn, and related readiness.
ChatRequest/ChatResponse keyed by session_id and trace_id.
ToolDefinition generated from Tool Registry; provider schemas generated in adapters.
TOOL_CALL and TOOL_RESULT messages correlated and routed through ToolGate.
Missing provider features fail closed or use explicit deterministic emulation with strict parsing; no silent degradation.
Provider quirks such as tool ID sanitization, thinking-block scrubbing, refusal detection, and endpoint routing stay inside adapter layer.
preserved_acceptance: ProviderCapabilities are discoverable and drive runtime behavior.
At least one provider path supports multi-turn streaming tool loops without bypassing ToolGate or Tool Registry.
Provider quirks do not leak into session/orchestration code.

folded_complete.preserved_intent: Consent receipt, cloud escalation request, and projection-plan evidence must become stable portable backend evidence with manifest, hash, retention, replay, and export semantics.
preserved_technical_scope: Canonical manifest/hash/retention semantics for consent_receipt.json and cloud_escalation_request.json.
Explicit relation to Flight Recorder, storage portability, and bounded export.
Stable ids, hashes, and retention semantics survive storage/backend swaps.
Cloud UI flow redesign and provider-specific consent flows remain out of scope.
preserved_acceptance: Consent artifacts are portable backend evidence, not workflow-local JSON only.
Replay/export packets can rely on one canonical consent-artifact portability contract.

folded_complete.preserved_intent: Runtime settings.exec_policy and Work Profile compute presets must be accepted, governed, downgraded deterministically when unsupported, and recorded as requested-vs-effective Flight Recorder telemetry.
preserved_technical_scope: Runtime settings accepts exec_policy.
Work Profiles accept per-role compute presets standard, fast_exact, and fast_approx.
Approximate execution requires waiver_ref; if waiver missing/expired, downgrade to exact.
Emit FR-EVT-LLM-EXEC-001 llm_exec_policy with requested vs effective policy, hashes, summaries, waiver_ref, and hsk.layerwise_trace@0.1 artifact ref when applicable.
No true layer-wise inference algorithms, multi-device inference, sharding, token IDs by default, or raw prompts in traces.
preserved_acceptance: Approximate execution cannot occur without valid waiver.
settings.exec_policy produces Flight Recorder telemetry for requested/effective policy.
Trace artifact reference exists or has explicit null reason.

folded_as_dependency_or_correlation_requ.preserved_intent: Flight Recorder events must carry model_session_id for session-scoped operations so cross-event model/session correlation is complete.
required_by_this_wp: ModelLaneRun and ModelLane records must include session_id and, where applicable, model_session_id correlation.
Session-scoped Flight Recorder/EventLedger events emitted by model lanes must be queryable by session.
Backward compatibility/migration strategy must be explicit if event envelope fields change.
folded_as_dependency_or_correlation_requ.note: Task Board currently shows WP-1-FR-ModelSessionId-v1 as VALIDATED, so this packet treats it as a correlation dependency and must not re-open or supersede it unless runtime evidence proves the requirement is still missing.

not_folded.reason: Stub contract has empty draft_scope. Do not invent scope; model profile fields needed here are specified directly by ModelLane/Work Profile requirements.
Stub contract has empty draft_scope. Preserve as separate placeholder until operator or spec provides technical payload.
Stub contract has empty draft_scope. Observability duties for this WP are covered by HBR-INT-001/007/009 and Flight Recorder requirements.
Stub contract has empty draft_scope. Visual/debug requirements are specified directly as project-named internal viewing-tool obligations; naming itself is out of scope for this WP.

Broader PostgreSQL parity for Work Packet, Micro-Task, and Task Board records is not safe to fold without widening this WP beyond model-lane communication. This WP still requires PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority for new model-lane artifacts.

Already owns broad CRDT workspace/write-box/control-plane hardening. This WP reuses that direction and requires CRDT semantics for lane-touched shared editable state without re-opening the whole kernel packet.
